chunks.page_summary: This page details the minimum system requirements for installing the Rheonics Control Panel, including operating system, necessary software, free disk space, and RAM.
chunks.extracted_text:
Phone: +1 713 234 0863

Minimum system requirements for installing the
Rheonics Control Panel

Modified on: Fri, 3 Jul, 2020 at 10:43 AM

Operating System: Windows 7 or Higher (Windows 10 recommended)
Required: LabVIEW Run-Time Engine 2019, and NI-VISA Run-Time Engine 19.0. Included in the full installer RCPSetup_Vx.x.x.x_full.exe
Both run-time engine installers are also available online at:
https://www.ni.com/es-cr/support/downloads/software-products/download.labview.html#301182
(https://www.ni.com/es-cr/support/downloads/software-products/download.labview.html#301182)
https://www.ni.com/es-cr/support/downloads/drivers/download.ni-visa.html#305862
(https://www.ni.com/es-cr/support/downloads/drivers/download.ni-visa.html#305862)
Free Disk Space: 2 GB (For full installation including run-time engines)
RAM: 2GB

specifications.Required Software: LabVIEW Run-Time Engine 2019, NI-VISA Run-Time Engine 19.0

key_facts: The Rheonics Control Panel requires an operating system of Windows 7 or higher, with Windows 10 being recommended.
Required software includes LabVIEW Run-Time Engine 2019 and NI-VISA Run-Time Engine 19.0.
The full installer for the Rheonics Control Panel is named RCPSetup_Vx.x.x.x_full.exe and includes the necessary run-time engines.
Online links are provided for downloading the LabVIEW and NI-VISA run-time engine installers.
A minimum of 2 GB of free disk space is required for a full installation, which includes the run-time engines.
The system needs at least 2 GB of RAM.
The document was modified on Friday, July 3, 2020, at 10:43 AM.
